allow: Bash(else echo "Output file not ready yet")
Bash(for file in learning_memory_api.py layer1.py repo_genesis.py directory_hierarchy.py auth.py genesis_keys.py telemetry.py)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Enhance file management, retrieval, and frontend capabilities

Major improvements to file handling, retrieval system, and UI:
- Enhanced file management API with improved upload and organization
- Upgraded retrieval with better reranking and result filtering
- Improved FileBrowser with enhanced UI/UX and file operations
- Updated embedder with optimized settings and performance
- Added new requirements and configuration updates

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Update core infrastructure and database layer

Core system improvements across database, models, and utilities:
- Enhanced database connection handling and session management
- Updated repository patterns and model structures
- Improved version control and Git service integration
- Refined embedding and vector database interfaces
- Updated RAG prompts and utilities

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
